summary: Low-Level Design document created for FR-BRICK-003 (Brick Type Selector). The design defines component architecture, data models, sequence diagrams, error handling, and accessibility requirements. PR #18 opened for human design review.

artifacts.name: LLD - Brick Type Selector
artifacts.description: Complete low-level design for brick type selector with 4 types and footprint logic

human_review_required.reason: Human approval required before implementation proceeds

recommended_actions: Review the LLD for completeness and alignment with PRD and Technical Architecture
Verify that all acceptance criteria are addressed
Check that test coverage is sufficient (T-FE-BRICK-003-01 through 04)
Approve the PR to merge LLD to main, or request changes with specific feedback
